creator: michael@jester.gun.de
text:
I get 'unrecoverable errors' when using tar with /dev/rwt0. The
	kernel is configured correctly; the streamer is found during
	startup.

Fix: 

I would be happy, if you could make the streamer work :-)
How-To-Repeat: 
	every command which uses the streamer. 

	'mt' won't use the streamer ( unknown tape )

	tar gives me 'unrecoverable' errors or 'input/ourput-errors'. The
	drive is detected and tar sees if it is write-protected.

	tar tvf /dev/rwt0
